Accepts a feed ID and request body with updatable fields such as title, category assignment, and other feed preferences. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated Feed object with all current metadata.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic and lacks specificity about what can be updated, input requirements, and return value. Enhanced version specifies the feed ID parameter requirement, lists examples of updatable fields, clarifies partial update support, and specifies the return type for better AI agent interpretability.
